items.title: FPGA-Based Simple CPU Design using VHDL
items.text: In this project I designed and implemented a basic Central Processing Unit (CPU) using VHDL and deployed it on an Altera FPGA board. The central processing unit (CPU) had an Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) that could do different kinds of math and logic operations, a Finite State Machine (FSM)-based program counter (PC) that could get and run instructions, and registers that could store temporary data.

items.title: LED Torch PCB Design (KiCad)
items.text: I designed and developed a compact LED torch (flashlight) using KiCad, featuring a high-brightness LED, a current-limiting resistor, a DPDT switch for user control, and a CR2032 coin cell battery holder. The project involved full schematic capture, PCB layout optimization, and 3D visualization to ensure a functional and reliable design.

items.title: IEEE TMU Chapter Website
items.text: Developed and launched the official website for the IEEE Toronto Metropolitan University Chapter, enhancing accessibility to events, resources, and updates. Focused on responsive design, user engagement, and performance optimization to support the chapter's initiatives.
